keyword: Will I only get the device after I finish paying the instalment?
answer:
No. After the first installment payment has been confirmed, the order will be processed and shipped out
accordingly.

For more information on easy instalments, visit https://compasia.my/pages/financing-plan for a better
understanding of your Debit/Credit card installment needs.

keyword: How much to pay for the monthly instalment?
answer:
The monthly installment is subject to:
Price and model of the phone
Storage capacity
Cosmetic grading (As-New/Excellent/Good/Fair)
Find out more at https://compasia.my/pages/financing-plan or simply divide the total price by the number of
months selected for installment.
